tool_purpose: Dreamlike Anime 1.0 is a high quality anime model, made by dreamlike.art. It can be used to generate anime-style images based on text prompts. The model is trained on 768x768px images and works best with prompts that include 'photo anime, masterpiece, high quality, absurdres'. It can be used with the Stable Diffusion Pipeline from the diffusers library. Framework: Hugging Face. Functionality: Text-to-Image. API call: StableDiffusionPipeline.from_pretrained('dreamlike-art/dreamlike-anime-1.0', torch_dtype=torch.float16)(prompt, negative_prompt=negative_prompt).
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
